title: Three questions on the future of quantum science and technology
author_string: S. Radenkovic, M. Dugic, I. Radojevic
abstract: The answers on the current status and future development of Quantum Science and Technology are presented.
comment: The Editorial Board of the Kragujevac Journal of Science decided to ask the prominent researchers and scholars to take part in the poll on the status and the future of Quantum Science and Technology
